'''Biewa''' was an industrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] used as the headquarters of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Picket Fleet/Legends|Picket Fleet]]. It was a relatively poor world, and the [[Biewan]]s spent what few [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] they had on clothing, shelter and food.

{{Planet-stub}}
